description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with clean lines and a flat roof, typical of contemporary urban architecture. The exterior is predominantly light gray, with a section of the roof and a rear area finished in a contrasting brown material, possibly wood or composite decking. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of small and medium-sized rectangular panes distributed along the sides. The front facade includes a recessed entryway and a set of steps leading up to the main door, while the rear appears to have a raised platform or terrace. The structure is likely constructed from concrete or masonry, with metal and glass elements for windows and railings. The overall appearance is minimalist, emphasizing function and simplicity.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist rectangular form, light gray exterior, and asymmetrical windows. Features include a recessed entryway, steps, and a contrasting brown roof section.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entryway, steps, and main door, with minimal window openings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated rectangular shape, flat roof, and a brown rear section, with scattered windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a raised brown platform or terrace and limited window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more visible windows and a clear view of the flat roof and entry steps.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with steps, minimal overhang, and a simple modern door
